name: AMIC
description: AMIC was founded in 1990 as Egypt's first Sharia compliant private equity firm and was listed in the Egyptian Stock Exchange in 1995. AMIC focuses on building a diverse strategic portfolio via its top-notch management team. AMIC continuously strives to unlock new levels of growth and shareholders value through Guidance, Close Monitoring, and Follow up with management teams to ensure higher efficiency and greater returns of portfolio companies, capitalizing on its past experience, knowledge and networks to invest in market-leading companies with strong growth potentials.

**Welcome to AMIC**
# Agile, Cost-Effective, and Mission-Focused
The Acquisition Management and Integration Center (AMIC) exists to provide services acquisition solutions for Air Combat Command (ACC), the largest of the Air Force’s Major Commands. With an acquisition portfolio of more than $22 billion, AMIC’s mission is to be agile, cost-effective, and mission-focused.
* * *
![JTAC.png](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5da748af3e60545f3bb3a249/1571670711996-A6XHEY2L003RPNEFGGRG/JTAC.png)
About
Find out about our organization,
mission, and the impact our service provides to the warfighter.
[Learn More](https://www.accamic.com/about)
![reaper.png](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5da748af3e60545f3bb3a249/1571670841947-2WU8Q9ST1EM9MY808IKI/reaper.png)
Programs
The AMIC provides contracting, program management, and quality assurance to a wide variety of Air Combat Command requirements supporting warfighter readiness.
[View Programs](https://www.accamic.com/programs)
![Comm.png](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5da748af3e60545f3bb3a249/1571670477735-HG6ZU77UPHQE3ON0EX1V/Comm.png)
CONTACT Us
Have some questions?
[Get Answers](https://www.accamic.com/contact)
![AMIC_Logo_3.jpg](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/5da748af3e60545f3bb3a249/1571670578904-J5XMBS4ZG072VP1VHJHO/AMIC_Logo_3.jpg)
Careers
Want to join the mission? You can be a critical member of our team.
[Find Out How](https://www.accamic.com/careers)

tavily.answer:
The official website for the Asian Media Information and Communication Centre (AMIC) is https://amic.asia. AMIC focuses on media research and communication in Asia. It publishes scholarly journals like Media Asia and Asian Journal of Communication.
AMIC refers to the Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Centre in Northern Ireland, a £100m collaborative project. It also stands for Australian Meat Industry Council, a peak industry association. AMIC Energy Management GmbH is an oil and gas company focused on electric vehicle charging.
Amca, a California-based aerospace company, raised $300 million in a Series B funding round, focusing on manufacturing and supply-chain technologies. The company has a valuation over $1 billion. Crunchbase provides comprehensive company datasets and tools for investor research.
Wellfound is a legitimate job board for tech and startup roles, offering direct connections between candidates and employers. It features one-click applications and tracks interest. Established in 2022, it connects over 10 million candidates with 150,000+ jobs.
DealRoom is an M&A platform offering tools for deal management, diligence, and integration. It provides a centralized environment for managing mergers and acquisitions. The platform aims to enhance efficiency and decision-making in M&A processes.
